steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject is the single quoted word Analyst. The phrase beginning with like other dactyls is just an interrupting comparison, so it does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: Choice A uses a plural/base verb form. Choices B and D use plural auxiliaries, which also disagree with the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular present-tense verb form. The answer is C.
